title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Business Development Manager at Akshaya Private Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
